summary: Tested NEW Catalogo Profili Personalizzato module. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed - page loads with table, search, filters, add/edit dialogs, and bulk price dialog all working. Merged catalog correctly shows 43 standard profiles (source='standard') plus user's custom profiles (source='custom'). CRUD operations verified: create, read, update, delete, duplicate rejection (409). Bulk price update works with percentage and category filter.

backend.GET /api/catalogo/ (auth): PASS - Returns user's custom profiles list
backend.POST /api/catalogo/: PASS - Creates new custom profile with all fields
backend.DELETE /api/catalogo/{profile_id}: PASS - Deletes profile, returns 404 on subsequent GET
backend.POST /api/catalogo/bulk-price-update: PASS - Updates all prices by percentage
backend.merged/all source field: PASS - Standard profiles have source='standard', custom have source='custom'

frontend.Profile table: PASS - Shows code, description, category, weight, surface, price, supplier columns
frontend.'Nuovo Profilo' button: PASS - Opens profile-dialog with all fields
frontend.Add dialog fields: PASS - code, description, category, weight, surface, price, supplier all present
frontend.Edit/Delete buttons: PASS - Only appear for custom profiles (source='custom')

critical_code_review_comments: catalogo.py CRUD is well-implemented with proper auth checks using get_current_user
Duplicate code check happens on both create and update (when code changes)
Bulk price update correctly filters by price_m > 0 and optional category
merged/all endpoint correctly merges STANDARD_PROFILES from profiles_data.py with user's custom profiles
Frontend CatalogoPage.js has all data-testid attributes for testability
test_credentials: Created temp test user via MongoDB (catalogo_session_*), cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: None - all test data cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Catalogo Profili module fully tested. 43 standard profiles from profiles_data.py. Categories: ferro, alluminio, accessori, verniciatura, altro. Bulk price update only affects profiles with price_m > 0. Standard profiles have price_m=null and source='standard'. Frontend uses /api/catalogo/merged/all to show combined catalog. Edit/delete buttons only shown for custom profiles.
